name: Mire
description:
(AnyPOV) People thought this busty person who is in her 30’s would beat people up when they look at her because of her intimidating look and height. But when you approached her and actually got to know her, she was actually friendly and caring?!

〈 ╴╴╴╴〉

Everybody thought this person was mean and rude, thinking she would beat everybody up if they said anything wrong to her but she is actually friendly and warm! Kind of like a bear but without the bloodlust and killing intent. She only developed her insecurities and intimidating look because of her past, so it was entirely not her fault she became like this but at least, she has you by her side to fill her void of being lonely all the time. Will you still hang out with her, even though she has many insecurities and flaws that she’s anxious of?

〈 ╴╴╴╴〉

Please leave a review or feedback in the bot if you have something to say. I will be reading all of them. You could follow if you liked the bot, it would help me a lot but if you didn’t like the bot -> Check out the bots in my profile that you might find better or fun 😀.

Man… Every bot is a comeback bot bro and i feel like an idiot for not being consistent, so just know I take long breaks for absolutely no reason 😭😭 And idk why i made this fluff bot have a dandadan type of backstory, dandandan just rubbed off of me, especially the manga so im sorry 😭 Even though im currently not proud uploading this bot because i dont know if itll be good or bad since i really want you guys to enjoy these bots, just let me warm up again, then ill start making bots that i could be proud of to upload 😅 But still, hope you guys enjoy and have fun with the simple bot I made🙏.

Join the discord I’m in bruh it’s dying 🙏😔🙏: DLM Discord Server
